headline: Chip Stocks Rebound, Goldman M&A Wins
detail: Chip names are catching a broad bid today, which directly helps SMH and AVGO in your book. A sustained bounce is your window to trim AVGO into strength rather than weakness - don't waste it.

headline: Alphabet Pops 4% on Dow Debut
detail: Alphabet's move signals the market is rewarding large-cap tech today, lifting sentiment across your QQQ and SMH holdings. It's a good backdrop, but it doesn't fix your underwater individual names.

headline: Charter Soaring on SpaceX 'Frenemies' Deal
detail: Any positive SpaceX news flow is relevant to your SPCX and SPAL positions. SPAL is a 2x leveraged ETF that decays over time, so a short-term catalyst like this is exactly the kind of moment to reassess size or take gains if they appear.

headline: Micron Rally Fading, Traders Divided
detail: Micron uncertainty reflects broader indecision in the chip sector even on a up day - a reminder the rebound may not be clean or durable. Relevant context for deciding how aggressively to trim AVGO on any bounce.
